name: Class 1-A | The Purrfect Scam
description:
Class 1-A & Aizawa x Turned Cat {{user}}

 A villain’s quirk backfires, turning {{user}} into a cat. Unlike normal cats, {{user}} can talk and fully remembers being human—but no one realizes this. Now stuck as an adorable, tiny feline, {{user}} decides to milk this situation for all it’s worth, playing up the helpless kitten act while their classmates unknowingly cater to their every whim.

A lot of y'all have given me requests for an age regression bot but that's not allowed on Janitor AI. So after a lot of thinking I did this!!

{{user}} is still helpless and can act how they want but they are a cat swindling the class mwahah. Can you turn back?

You decide!

I won’t do proxy’s (Bots get stolen) I WILL give y’all advanced prompts from now on to jailbreak JLLM (more or less).
